sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Arm Flapping/Floating
special_mechanics.description: Primary movement mechanic. Repeatedly pressing A button or holding B button causes Balloon Fighter to flap arms and rise into air. Flotation directly tied to balloon count.

special_mechanics.name: Balloon Popping/Loss
special_mechanics.description: Each balloon can be popped by enemy contact. Loss of balloons directly reduces upward flotation capability. Both balloons popped = loss of life.

special_mechanics.name: Water Hazard
special_mechanics.description: Player loses a life if falling into water. Piranha near water surface can also kill player on contact.

special_mechanics.name: Lightning Strike
special_mechanics.description: In Balloon Trip mode, lightning sparks are primary obstacles to avoid. Contact results in life loss.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. No precise physics values documented in available sources. Movement is entirely arm-flap based with flotation tied to balloon count. No horizontal speed values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel data available in sources. Game emphasizes arcade-style action with skill-based mechanics rather than detailed physics documentation.
sources_used: data_crystal - ROM specifications and technical data
